title: Fixing React Component Re-renders Due to Changing Object Reference

statement.markdown: You are given a React functional component `Person` that displays a person's name and age. The component's state is updated with a new `person` object when the `handleIncrement` function is called. However, the component re-renders unnecessarily even when the `person` object reference remains the same but its properties change. Fix the bug by utilizing React's `useMemo` hook to memoize the `person` object.
statement.inputFormat: The input will be an object with a `name` and an `age` property.
statement.outputFormat: The output will be a string displaying the person's name and age.
statement.notes: The `person` object reference should remain the same when the `handleIncrement` function is called.

constraints.description: The number of times the `handleIncrement` function is called.

examples.explanation: The component should not re-render when the `person` object reference remains the same.
The component should re-render when the `person` object changes.

hints.text: Use the `useMemo` hook to memoize the `person` object.

editorial.title: Editorial Solution
editorial.intuition: React's `useMemo` hook can be used to memoize the `person` object and prevent unnecessary re-renders.
editorial.bruteForce: One possible brute force solution is to use the `useState` hook to update the `person` object and then re-render the component.
editorial.betterSolution: A better solution would be to use the `useCallback` hook to memoize the `handleIncrement` function and then use it to update the `person` object.
editorial.optimalSolution: The optimal solution is to use the `useMemo` hook to memoize the `person` object and then use it to render the component.
editorial.proofOfCorrectness: The `useMemo` hook ensures that the `person` object is only updated when it changes, preventing unnecessary re-renders.
commonMistakes: Not using the `useMemo` hook to memoize the `person` object
Not using the `useCallback` hook to memoize the `handleIncrement` function
